<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/system/generic-credentials"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List system-level generic credentials. Returns a Kubernetes
SecretList resource containing heavily redacted Secrets.

  parameters={undefined}
